instructions: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Chop cherry tomatoes and cucumber.
In a bowl, mix quinoa, tomatoes, cucumber, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season chicken with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes on each side until cooked through.
Slice bell pepper and zucchini, grill for 3-4 minutes.
Serve chicken with grilled vegetables.
3029d1cbd877c4bd7c483a5067605565688c3827.name: Grilled Chicken with Vegetables

instructions: In a pot, bring water to a boil.
Add rolled oats and reduce heat, simmer for 5 minutes.
Slice banana and add to oatmeal.
Stir in honey and cinnamon.
Serve warm.
